events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are asked to produce a JSON assessment for Form build & bracing, part of Concrete & Masonry scope. The field condition is "blowout evidence." The work is roughed in but not yet closed out. Reference: ACI 347. Treat as roughly 70% complete until defects corrected.

We need to assess: how far along, percent complete, defects, remaining work. Decision likely "fail" because blowout evidence indicates a failure during concrete placement, likely due to inadequate bracing or formwork. This is dangerous and non-compliant. So decision: fail. Risk: likely high or critical because blowout can cause structural collapse, injury, or damage. I'll say critical. Work stage: rough-complete (as given). Component conditions: installed-defective, maybe non-compliant. Since it's blowout evidence, the formwork failed, so defective. Also non-compliant with ACI 347. So component_conditions: ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"]. Percent complete: 70% as stated, but with defects, it's not really complete; the problem likely sets percent complete to 70. Value: none asked, set 0. Sound_source etc. not relevant. Order: none. Workable: maybe no work can proceed until corrective actions. So empty list. Findings: "Blowout evidence observed, indicating formwork failure during concrete placement." Actions: "Immediately stop work, secure area, investigate cause, repair or replace formwork per ACI 347, re-inspect before proceeding." Rationale: "Blowout indicates formwork was unable to withstand concrete pressure, posing safety and quality risks. Work cannot proceed until corrections are made." References: ["ACI 347"].

Confidence: 0.95 maybe. Event_time, rate, order: not needed. Workable: I'll put an empty list as no work should continue. The output JSON must exactly match the schema. I'll construct it.

Decision: "fail", risk: "critical", work_stage: "rough-complete", component_conditions: ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], percent_complete: 70, value: 0, sound_source: "", event_time: 0.0, rate: 0.0, order: [], workable: [], findings: ["Blowout evidence observed, indicating formwork failure during concrete placement."], actions: ["Stop work immediately, secure area, investigate cause, repair/replace formwork per ACI 347, re-inspect before proceeding."], rationale: "Blowout indicates formwork was unable to withstand concrete pressure, posing safety and quality risks. Work cannot proceed until corrections are made.", references: ["ACI 347 Section on formwork bracing and design loads."], confidence: 0.95.

Set event_time: 0.0, rate: 0.0. Ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,

  "findings": ["Blowout evidence observed, indicating formwork failure during concrete placement."],
  "actions": ["Stop work immediately, secure area, investigate cause, repair/replace formwork per ACI 347, re-inspect before proceeding."],
  "rationale": "Blowout indicates formwork was unable to withstand concrete pressure, posing safety and quality risks. Work cannot proceed until corrections are made.",
  "references": ["ACI 347 Section on formwork bracing and design loads."]
}
